title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAUG, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO ASUNCION.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4834 / 53 OG No. 15, 4785 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1675, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAUG, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, TO ASUNCION.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Saug, Province of Davao, is changed to Asuncion.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
